_comment: EcoPulse Stadium — Sample Telemetry Snapshot. Represents a single sensor poll cycle at the 75th minute of Group A match at MetLife Stadium. In production, replace with real-time WebSocket or REST feed from venue IoT middleware.

south_concourse._waste_flag: HVAC at 100% with only 10% crowd density — primary energy waste event

engine_output_shape.block_1: ORGANIZER SUSTAINABILITY METRICS — per-sector efficiency, waste flags, DATA GAP notices, overall score
engine_output_shape.block_2: GROUND STAFF ACTIONS & ALERTS — push-notification style, priority ordered (safety > overflow > routine)
engine_output_shape.block_3: AUTOMATED UTILITY COMMANDS — HVAC/lighting adjustments approved or BLOCKED by safety rule
